name: wc
description: wc — count lines, words, and characters. Answer 'how many lines', 'how many words', 'number of lines', 'count the lines/words' in text. Reads text from standard input and prints the count. Use -l to count lines, -w to count words, -c to count bytes, -m to count characters. Without flags, prints all three counts. Use for counting lines in a list, measuring text length, counting entries, or answering 'how many' questions about text.

input.description: Text to count, provided on standard input.

output.description: Counts of lines, words, and characters (or whichever subset was requested via flags).
